title: EVEE: Interpretable variant effect prediction from genomic foundation model embeddings
abstract_snippet: Evo 2 embeddings achieve 0.997 AUROC on ClinVar SNVs, generalize to indels. Pre-computed predictions for 4.2M ClinVar variants.
summary: Evo 2 genomic foundation model (7B params) achieves SOTA pathogenicity prediction (0.997 AUROC on 839k ClinVar variants) from embeddings alone, generalizes zero-shot to indels. Provides interpretable disruption profiles via annotation probes. Pre-computed predictions for all 4.2M ClinVar variants. Potential tool for scoring Teagan's noncoding variants.
